title: Salty Indian Rice Flour Dosa
description: A salty and tender Indian dish featuring rice flour pancakes, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe is Whole30-friendly and made in a copper mug.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the rice flour and salt.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick skillet or copper mug over medium heat.
Brush the skillet or mug with ghee or coconut oil.
Pour a small amount of the batter into the skillet or mug and spread it evenly.
Cook the dosa for 2 minutes, until the bottom is lightly browned.
Loosen the dosa with a spatula and flip it over.
Cook the other side for another 1-2 minutes, until lightly browned.
Repeat the process with the remaining batter.
Serve the dosas hot with chopped cilantro on top.
